features.featureTitle: In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, locate the CTA button element in the hero section identified by the XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[3]/div[5]/a[1]/button[1] and change its background color from white to a white-pink tone (e.g., bg-pink-100 or #fff0f5). Ensure the button text remains legible against the new background.
